Hunters will lose all bison bonus points if they purchase this permit
Very difficult, low success hunt

properties.notes: I am recommending this hunt to elevate some of the pressure on the earlier bison hunts. We have received many complaints about hunter crowding on earlier hunts, and hopefully this will help. The long season should allow hunters plenty of time to find bison in the more remote areas of the unit if they are weathered out of the roadless area. There is potential that hunters might have an extremely difficult time finding bison during this hunt.
properties.public_advisories: This has the potential to be very low success. It will be a physically demanding hunt! The weather can be extremely cold and harsh during this time of year. The Ute Tribal access across the Totem pol trail expires after Nov. 30. Good luck!
